prestazioni: Engine: 1UR-FSE 5.0L V8 hybrid (394 hp stock) – Full hybrid system overhaul with a **MagnaFlow 17300** 3.5" stainless steel cat-back exhaust featuring dual 4.5" rolled-edge tips, paired with a **GReddy E-Manage Ultimate** piggyback ECU to optimize the hybrid battery discharge curve for linear power delivery (target: 480 hp at 6,400 RPM with 420 lb-ft torque at 4,000 RPM).

Forced Induction: **HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit** (L2000 frame) with a **Vortech V-3 Si-Trim** auxiliary blower (8 psi max boost) and **PWR Australia** intercooler core (4.5" thick, 1,200 CFM airflow) to prevent heat soak in the 1UR-FSE’s high-compression (11.8:1) environment. Includes **ID1000x injectors** and a **Walbro 450 LPH** in-tank fuel pump with a **Radium Engineering** dual feed fuel rail.

Drivetrain & Handling: **OS Giken LSD** (2.2-way, 45% lockup) for the rear axle, paired with **D2 Racing RS Coilovers** (32-way damping, 2.5" drop) and **SPL Parts** front/rear sway bars (25mm hollow, adjustable end links). Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 6S** 6-piston calipers (405mm rotors front, 380mm rear) with **Ferodo DS2500** pads and **Goodridge G-Stop** braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Body Kit: **Liberty Walk LB Works** widebody conversion (LS600h-specific, 50mm flares) with **Seibon Carbon** hood (dual heat extractors) and **Varis Japan** front lip spoiler (carbon fiber, 3-piece). Rear diffuser by **3D Carbon** (matte black, integrated dual exhaust cutouts).

Wheels & Stance: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 22x10.5" ET30 (front) and 22x12" ET40 (rear) in **Gunmetal Bronze**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (265/30/22 front, 315/25/22 rear). Fender roll by **Auto Fiberglass** with **Air Lift Performance 3P** management (bagged setup, 3" drop).

Interior & Aero: **Recaro SP-G** front seats (alcantara/leather, 6-point Schroth harnesses) with **Takata Drift II** rear seats (reclined 15°). **Aim Solo 2 DL** data logger mounted on a **NRG Innovations** quick-release steering wheel hub. **AeroCatch** hood latches (carbon fiber) and **Rally Armor** mud flaps (custom Lexus LS600h embroidery).
